TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Rafael_Araújo, title = Rafael_Araújo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rafael_Araújo} }

S.FORM: Rafael Araújo sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1980, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 8, Rafael Araújo, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Rafael Araújo sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1980, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 8, Rafael Araújo, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ra*ael ara*jo s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ra*ael ara*jo, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
